decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-sbs matches existing registry record; same variant (SBS / select_bus_service), same corridor (Nostrand/Rogers, Brooklyn). The source 2011_03_07_brt_nostrand_cb3 is already in the registry card's source_ids. No different record to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before. SBS buses will have the same fare as the locals.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-limited matches existing registry record; same variant (Limited / limited_stop_bus), same corridor (Nostrand/Rogers, Brooklyn). do_not_merge_pairs confirm distinctness from route_b44-sbs and route_b44-local. Already resolved correctly.

proposed_relations.description: B44 Limited service is the predecessor that was converted into B44 SBS on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor.
